name: Hot Cheese Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a small ring mold and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
3. Open biscuits; dip into mixture of melted butter, onion juice, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Dip into grated cheese.
5. Arrange, overlapping, in mold.
6. Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until brown.
7. Turn out of pan immediately.
Serves 8.
